notes.scope: GET-only full publish-set check: every RELEASE-MANIFEST.json entry fetched from https://verifyhash.com and sha256-compared against both the manifest hash and the on-disk public/ bytes; all 39 identical. Every .html page live-serves exactly one data-goatcounter= snippet (8 pages).
notes.mobile390: 390px full-page screenshots of / and /verify-vh-standalone.html (throwaway, /tmp) reviewed: no horizontal overflow on either page, header nav and footer link list wrap correctly on the index (T-VHMOB.1 + footer-wrap fixes confirmed live), verifier form controls fit the viewport.
notes.onMismatch: a future non-empty mismatches[] means the live deploy drifted from commit — file a needs-human redeploy note; never edit live content from the repo side.
